blocks.text: To: Engagement Team, Snow-Berry Inventory Control Study
Re: Kickoff of the Snow-Berry engagement

Fieldwork on our engagement for {{fact:f:E-2001-001.client}} began on {{fact:f:E-2001-001.start}}. The objective of the study is straightforward: determine why the inventory records do not agree with what is on the shelf, and leave the client with a program its own people can run to keep the records honest. Darryl Rogers, VP Finance, is our client contact; all requests for records and plant access go through his office.

items: Receiving and put-away: observe current practice at the dock and in the warehouse, and document the paperwork that follows the material.
Record accuracy: compare the perpetual records against physical counts and trace the sources of the differences.
Ordering and replenishment: review how reorder points and order quantities are set and who authorizes purchases.
Reporting: define the plain-numbers reports management should see each month.

blocks.text: Andrea Diaz will be on site through the first phase of fieldwork and will keep the working file. I will schedule a working session with Darryl Rogers once the first round of observations is complete. Please direct questions to me. Nothing goes to the client in writing without my review.
